sections.paragraph:
Original: חורי חרי

Transliteration: chôrı̂y chôrı̂y

Phonetic: kho-ree'

BDB Definition:

Hori = "cave dweller"
  1. a Horite, son of Lotan, the son of Seir
  2. a Simeonite, father of Shaphat

Origin: the same as H2752

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
